name: io.github.docs4llm/docs4llm
title: docs4llm
description: Remote MCP server that turns docs, GitHub repos, and OpenAPI specs into AI-ready tools.

project_id.description: Your docs4llm project ID. Find it under Dashboard → your project → Connect tab.

headers.name: Authorization
headers.description: Bearer <your project MCP token>. Generate one under the Connect tab of your project. Treat the token like a password.
